data.name: Phaetusa

weaponImprint.name: Principle of Causality
weaponImprint.trait: Increase AoE damage dealt by 5%. If Corrosion damage was dealt, increase AoE damage dealt by an additional 5%.
weaponImprint.effect: Increase Corrosion damage dealt by 15%/18%/21%/24%/27%/30%. If the active skill does not deal damage, increase the critical damage of the next attack by 15%/18%/21%/24%/27%/30%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increases damage dealt to targets with Corrosion debuffs by 2.5% and increase damage dealt to PMC units by 2.5%.

data.effects:
Gentle and tolerant, like a spring breeze on the face; sharp and haughty, like cold steel. The former is named Phaetusa, the latter is named Scavenger. This Doll of two hearts in one body—one half originates from the most beautiful guardianship of human civilization, the other side comes from the war wreckage of Sangvis Ferri.
They met amidst the flames of war, saved each other, and decided to forge their own path together in this turbulent era.

skills.name: Dual Slash
skills.description: Selects 1 target within 1 tile, dealing melee physical damage equal to 80% of attack to them.

skills.name: Escort
skills.description:
Each time Phaetusa deals melee damage, Phaetusa gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This can be triggered at most 3 times per turn.

When an enemy unit within range takes AoE damage from an allied unit, performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] dealing melee AoE Corrosion damage equal to 90% of attack and 1 point of stability damage. This effect can trigger up to 3 times per turn.

After using Replication Trap, Escort can be used as an active skill to gain [effect:e6969c33-8cec-4590-9a7d-9b3049ca93e3] and [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. This effect can be used at most once per battle.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Each time Phaetusa deals melee damage, Phaetusa gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This can be triggered at most 3 times per turn.

When an enemy unit within range takes AoE damage from an allied unit, performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] dealing melee AoE Corrosion damage equal to 90% of attack and 1 point of stability damage. This effect can trigger up to 3 times per turn.

After using Replication Trap, Escort can be used as an active skill to gain [effect:e6969c33-8cec-4590-9a7d-9b3049ca93e3] and [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. This effect can be used at most 2 times per battle. After using Escort, increase attack by 50% for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Each time Phaetusa deals melee damage, Phaetusa gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This can be triggered at most 3 times per turn.

When an enemy unit within range takes AoE damage from an allied unit, performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] dealing melee AoE Corrosion damage equal to 120% of attack and 1 point of stability damage. This effect can trigger up to 3 times per turn. For each [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] performed, increase mobility by 1 tile for 1 turn.

After using Replication Trap, Escort can be used as an active skill to gain [effect:e6969c33-8cec-4590-9a7d-9b3049ca93e3] and [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. This effect can be used at most 2 times per battle. After using Escort, increase attack by 50% for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Escort can be used 1 more time per battle.

After gaining [effect:e6969c33-8cec-4590-9a7d-9b3049ca93e3], increase attack by 50% for 1 round.

TL Note: The official CN description says 1 turn, but in testing the buff lasts for 1 round instead.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Increase damage multiplier of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] to 120%.

For each [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] performed, increase mobility by 1 tile.

skills.name: Double Descent
skills.description: Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile and dealing melee AoE Corrosion damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 1 tile wide.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile and dealing melee AoE Corrosion damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 3 tile wide.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Damage multiplier is increased to 120%.

Increase width by 2 tiles.

skills.name: Replication Trap
skills.description: Gain 1 stack of [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6], and apply [effect:1b73d68b-f004-4994-811a-53434c7d20f2] to all enemies on the battlefield for 2 turns. After using this skill, gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Gain 1 stack of [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6], and apply [effect:1b73d68b-f004-4994-811a-53434c7d20f2] to all enemies on the battlefield for 2 turns. After using this skill, gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. For every 2 uses of this skill, gain an additional stack of [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6] and gain 15% critical damage permanently.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Gain 1 stack of [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6], and apply [effect:1b73d68b-f004-4994-811a-53434c7d20f2] to all enemies on the battlefield for 2 turns. After using this skill, gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] and [effect:d7bdf1a8-7080-4d31-bce8-a113bbbe5e2c]. For every 2 uses of this skill, gain an additional stack of [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6] and gain 15% critical damage permanently.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: For every 2 uses of this skill, gain an additional stack of [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6] and gain 15% critical damage permanently.

skills.name: Twin Paradise
skills.description:
Deals AoE Corrosion damage equivalent to 90% of attack to all enemies within 5 tiles. Consumes all stacks of [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6], for each stack consumed, increase the damage multiplier of this skill by 10%, and increase the total damage dealt by 1×.

TL Note: Regarding “increase the total damage dealt by 1×”, this effect multiplies the total damage after all other multipliers. For example, by consuming 3 stacks of [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6], the damage becomes 4× its value after all other modifiers are applied.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Deals AoE Corrosion damage equivalent to 120% of attack to all enemies within 5 tiles. Consumes all stacks of [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6], for each stack consumed, increase the damage multiplier of this skill by 20%, and increase the total damage dealt by 1×.

TL Note: Regarding “increase the total damage dealt by 1×”, this effect multiplies the total damage after all other multipliers. For example, by consuming 3 stacks of [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6], the damage becomes 4× its value after all other modifiers are applied.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier is increased to 120%. For each [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6] consumed, increase damage multiplier by 20% instead.

keys.effect: When confectance index reaches 0 in the current round, increase damage dealt by 10%.
At the start of the turn, apply [effect:1b73d68b-f004-4994-811a-53434c7d20f2] to all enemy units for 1 turn. This effect can be triggered once every 2 turns.
When [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6] is fully stacked for the first time, increase your critical rate by 20%.
If an active skill only hits 1 target, increases the damage dealt by 15%.
For each stack of Blade Resonance consumed, recovers HP equal to 10% of max HP and 1 point of stability.
Before [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], cleanses 1 buff from the target.
After using active skill Replication Trap, gain 6 tiles of additional movement.

vertebrae.effect: For every 2 uses of this skill, gain an additional stack of [effect:805f64bb-a005-4b27-a500-405af4cce3e6] and gain 15% critical damage permanently.

imagoforms.effect: When dealing melee damage, damage dealt increases by 8%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Corrosion Damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
The damage of attacks which hit 2 or more enemy units is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Consumes 1 stack of this effect to increase damage multiplier. Max of 3 stacks. This effect cannot be cleansed.
The damage multiplier of the next active skill is increased by 200%. This effect cannot be cleansed.
At the end of your turn, revert to the state you had when this effect was gained (including all stats, effect stacks, and remaining durations). This effect cannot be cleansed.
